name: issueradar-ai-monorepo
description: AI-powered platform for open-source contributors to discover high-impact GitHub issues

scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix apps/web && (cd apps/api && python3 -m ruff check .)
scripts.format: npx prettier --write "**/*.{ts,tsx,json,md,yml,yaml}" && (cd apps/api && python3 -m ruff format .)
scripts.format:check: npx prettier --check "**/*.{ts,tsx,json,md,yml,yaml}" && (cd apps/api && python3 -m ruff format --check .)
